summary: All 9 tech-spec scenario criteria and all 15 user-spec acceptance criteria are covered by Verify-smoke commands and scenario checks across tasks 1-7. No critical gaps found; three medium-severity improvements identified around verify depth and edge-case explicitness.

findings.description: Task 3 Verify-smoke (design-review) uses only `grep -i 'non-obvious|неочевидн'` — a single keyword match. It does not verify that the instruction is marked as optional, nor that the existing 3-recommendation cap is preserved. The AC requires both, but only keyword presence is checked.
findings.suggestion: Add smoke check: `grep -i 'optional\|опционально\|только при' skills/design-review/SKILL.md` to confirm optional labeling. Add line-count regression check to confirm file did not shrink significantly.

findings.description: Task 7 Verify-smoke checks only `grep 'taste-profile'` (found) and phase count (6). It does not verify that Phase 0 specifically contains the taste-profile step, that graceful degradation is described, or that Phase 4 contains two-layer description — all required by the task AC.
findings.suggestion: Add targeted checks: `grep -A3 'Phase 0' skills/design-generate/SKILL.md | grep 'taste-profile'` and `grep -i 'two-layer\|layer 1\|layer 2' skills/design-generate/SKILL.md`.

findings.description: No Verify-smoke command across any task checks reference link resolution (that ../../shared/design-references/ paths actually point to existing files). The tech-spec Agent Verification Plan lists this as item 1 ('Reference resolution via bash test -e') but it appears only in QA (Task 11), not in per-task smoke checks.
findings.suggestion: Add to Tasks 5, 6 smoke: `test -f shared/design-references/designer-experience.md && echo OK` and `test -f shared/design-references/style-profiles.md && echo OK`. Task 4 could add `test -f .design-system/tokens.json` is not applicable (conditional), but path format verification is meaningful.

findings.description: Task 6 Verify-smoke checks only keyword presence (`grep 'designer-experience' skills/design-system-init/SKILL.md`) but does not verify that the step reads only the matching category section (Decision 4 requirement). A full-file read instead of section read would pass the smoke check.
findings.suggestion: Add smoke: `grep -i 'секцию\|section\|только соответствующ' skills/design-system-init/SKILL.md` to confirm selective section reading instruction is present.

findings.description: Task 2 Verify-smoke checks `grep -c '^## '` (4+) and `grep 'Антипаттерны'` but does not verify that the file contains append-only format description — required by AC item 5. The format description exists in the created file, but is not smoke-verified.
findings.suggestion: Add: `grep -i 'append-only\|append only' shared/design-references/designer-experience.md` to the smoke checks.

findings.description: style-profiles.md has 8 sections (^## count = 8), not 7 as stated in decisions.md. The extra section is likely a Quick Lookup table header or intro section, not an 8th style profile. This is not a test gap but an inconsistency between decisions.md (claims 7 profiles) and the grep-based smoke check. Smoke only counts all ## headers.
findings.suggestion: Clarify smoke command: `grep -c '^## ' shared/design-references/style-profiles.md` counts ALL H2 headers including non-profile sections. A more precise check would be `grep -c '^## [A-Z]' shared/design-references/style-profiles.md` to count only capitalized profile names.

findings.description: Scenario 9 from tech-spec ('no regression: existing phases, checkpoints, references preserved') has no dedicated Verify-smoke in any individual task. Task 5 decisions.md entry reports '5 original phases + checkpoints preserved' but this is self-reported by the implementing agent, not independently verified via a smoke command.
findings.suggestion: Add regression smoke to tasks 3-7: count existing phase headers before and after with `grep -c '^## Phase'` and assert count >= original. Task 5 should verify 5 original phases preserved (Phase 4.5 is new, total should be 6 post-modification).

verify_smoke_summary.notes: Counts ^## headers in style-profiles.md. Verified result: 8 (>=6 threshold met, 7 style profiles + likely intro/lookup section). Sufficient for basic structural check.
Counts category sections (4) and verifies Антипаттерны subsections exist. Missing: append-only format description verification.
Single keyword grep for 'non-obvious'. Does not verify optional labeling, 3-cap preservation, or that existing format was not modified.
Checks tokens.json keyword and silent/skip keywords. Both confirmed present. UI extensions (.tsx, .vue, .html, .css, .scss) are listed in the actual file.
Best coverage among all tasks: taste-profile, designer-experience, Phase 4.5/5, edge case handling. Confirmed all 4 checks pass per decisions.md.
Checks all three reference integrations. Missing: verification that section-only read (not full file) is instructed.
Only checks taste-profile keyword presence and phase count. Does not verify Phase 0 placement, graceful degradation, or Phase 4 two-layer description.
